title: Smokestack
content:
A small fish,
        its colors
        embers
        amid the swirling water;
        reminiscent of a
        caf� in darkness - 
        the smokestack tablecloth fluttering
        in the matchbox breeze.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Smokestack"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
